drills.name: Lateral Band Walk
drills.instructions: Band above knees. 20 side steps each direction. 3 sets.
drills.coach_tip: Push knee outward over middle toe on every step.
drills.progression: Add a squat between each step.

drills.name: Single-Leg Bounds
drills.instructions: Bound 20 m on one leg, switch. 5 sets each side.
drills.coach_tip: Count steps each side — equal rhythm, equal power.
drills.progression: Measure distance per bound and compare sides.

drills.name: Sprint Reaction Drill
drills.instructions: Start in athletic stance. On partner's signal sprint 15 m. 6 reps with full recovery.
drills.coach_tip: Drive your arms — faster arms means faster legs.
drills.progression: Add direction changes on second signal.
